heading: Promotions
label: 10207 Promotions
notes: Effective DateSection effective on first day of first pay period which begins after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2010 Amendment note under .Oct. 15, 2010section 5 of Pub. L. 111–282section 5102 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective on first day of first pay period which begins after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2010 Amendment note under .Oct. 15, 2010section 5 of Pub. L. 111–282section 5102 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Each member who is promoted to a higher rank shall receive basic pay at the same step at which such member was being compensated prior to the date of the promotion.

children.heading: .—Credit for Service
children.label: b .—Credit for Service
children.text: For the purposes of a service step adjustment under section 10205, periods of service at the lower rank shall be credited in the same manner as if it was service at the rank to which the employee is promoted.
